brandVoiceDescription: Warm, encouraging, and evidence-based. We speak directly to our audience using 'you' — like a knowledgeable friend who also happens to be a certified trainer. We celebrate strength at every age without being condescending. We cite sources when making health claims and never promise miracle results.
toneGuidelines: Keep sentences short and punchy for social
Cite sources for any health/fitness claims
Avoid medical advice — redirect to professionals
Use emoji sparingly — max 2-3 per post
visualGuidelines: Warm coral (#d94e33) + neutral earth tones. Clean sans-serif typography (Inter). Natural lighting, real bodies, inclusive representation.
typographyGuidelines: Headlines: Inter Bold 24-32px. Body: Inter Regular 16px. Captions: Inter Medium 14px.
photographyGuidelines: Real women, natural poses, diverse body types and skin tones. No overly filtered or retouched images. Prefer outdoor/natural light settings.

contentPillars.name: Industry News
contentPillars.description: Timely updates on industry shifts and breaking tech news.
